{{CargoClone
|name=Tenitsu
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=153
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Earth DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Earth DMG +1.5%
|}}
